text:
- Take maintainership

Removed file(s):
- pkg-plist

Makefile changed:
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+PLIST_FILES=
+PORTDATA=	*
+PORTDOCS=
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+post-install:
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}

Changed pkg-descr

Generated and tested manually, tested with port test and with RedPorts (all RELEASES, CLANG), sent with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: change, diff: ports)

How-To-Repeat: 
portlint -A
looks fine.

port test: clean
